race.comment: WESTERN MISS (7) jumped the $1.20 favourite last start and got the job done with ease, running away to score by 3.5L. Out in trip now looks a good move and Pike remains in the irons. Her last start rating is very strong for a race like this and she can bring up back-to-back wins. MYZOOM (5) missed by 1L at this track last time out, though that was in a stronger race than what she takes on today. The wide draw this time is a query, but she's racing in top order and Ramoly knows her well. Can make her presence felt once again. CONCHETTA'S DREAM (6) disappointed on the Heavy deck last time but her form prior stacks right up. Fiore hops on board now and the rise in trip looks to suit. Can feature on the quick turnaround. PROPORTRAIT (9) is building nicely into the campaign and he won't be far away. BIRD ON A WIRE (2) is next best.
